title: Hello, Gaijin
summary: Our corner about everything we love in Japan is officially open. Still dusting off the shelves.
content:
This is the first of many posts. A symbolic milestone, that final push that says it’s finally real.
それじゃ、始めよう。
This blog has been living rent-free in one of the authors’ heads for years. Always that personal project you keep meaning to start but never do, for no good reason other than the inertia of not beginning. Then it clicked: if we don’t write about the Japan we love, who will?
We’re not promising consistency, a schedule, or anything too serious. Just what matters: content made by people who actually care, our way, on our time.
